name: Goodyear Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Goodyear Baptist Church in Picayune, MS! There are 3 indoor wood and acrylic courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Pearl River County Fairgrounds Shelter
description: Pearl River County Fairgrounds Shelter is a place to play pickleball in Poplarville, MS. There are 4 indoor concrete courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include trainers or lessons, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Poplarville Fairgrounds Shelter
description: Poplarville Fairgrounds Shelter is a place to play pickleball in Poplarville, MS. There are 4 indoor concrete courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Roseland Park Baptist Church
description: Roseland Park Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Picayune, MS. There are 3 indoor wood and acrylic courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.
